info.name: Hermes – Gov Job Portal
info.description:
API collection for Hermes Government Job Vacancy Portal.

Variables:
- `base_url` → http://localhost:8000/api/v1
- `user_token` → set automatically after user login
- `admin_token` → set automatically after admin login
- `refresh_token` / `admin_refresh_token` → set after login
- `notification_id` → set after listing notifications

item.name: Send Email OTP
item.description: Send OTP to email for registration. OTP expires in 10 minutes.

item.name: Verify Email OTP
item.description: Verify the 6-digit OTP sent to email. Returns verification token.

item.name: Complete Registration
item.description: Complete registration with password after OTP verification. Password must have min 8 chars, 1 uppercase, 1 special character.

exec: console.log('Registration complete! Use custom_token with Firebase SDK to sign in.');

item.name: Check Phone Availability
item.description: Check if a phone number is already registered.

item.name: Verify Firebase Token
item.description: Exchange a Firebase ID token (from Firebase JS SDK) for an internal JWT pair. Creates user if new, links existing by firebase_uid or email.

item.name: Check User Providers
item.description: Check which authentication providers (Google, email/password) a user has.

item.name: Add Password to Google Account
item.description: Add password to a Google OAuth account that doesn't have one yet.

body.raw:
{
  "job_title": "SSC CGL 2026",
  "organization": "Staff Selection Commission",
  "job_type": "latest_job",
  "qualification_level": "graduate",
  "total_vacancies": 8000,
  "description": "Combined Graduate Level Exam 2026 recruitment.",
  "application_end": "2026-07-15",
  "fee_general": 100,
  "fee_obc": 100,
  "fee_sc_st": 0,
  "fee_ews": 0,
  "fee_female": 0,
  "status": "draft"
}

formdata.description: PDF notification file (max 10MB) - returns JSON immediately

item.name: Create Admin User (Admin only)
item.description: Create a new admin or operator account. Only admins can create new admin users.

request.description: Demographics, application trends, popular orgs, notification stats. Admin only.

item.name: Update Phone
item.description: Update phone number (marks as unverified until OTP verification).

item.name: Verify Phone OTP
item.description: Verify phone number with OTP sent via Firebase.

item.name: Set Password (Google Users)
item.description: Set password for Google OAuth users who don't have a password yet. Password must have min 8 chars, 1 uppercase, 1 special character.

item.name: Change Password
item.description: Change password (requires current password). New password must have min 8 chars, 1 uppercase, 1 special character.

item.name: Link Email+Password to Phone Account
item.description: Link email and password credentials to a phone-only account. Password must have min 8 chars, 1 uppercase, 1 special character.

item.name: Content – Public (Admit Cards, Answer Keys, Results)
Content – Admin (Admit Cards, Answer Keys, Results)

body.raw:
{
  "job_id": "{{job_id}}",
  "phase_number": 1,
  "title": "SSC CGL Tier-1 Admit Card 2026",
  "download_url": "https://ssc.nic.in/admit-card-tier1.pdf",
  "valid_from": "2026-04-01",
  "valid_until": "2026-04-15",
  "notes": "Download and keep 2 printouts"
}

{
  "job_id": "{{job_id}}",
  "phase_number": 1,
  "title": "SSC CGL Tier-1 Result 2026",
  "result_type": "shortlist",
  "download_url": "https://ssc.nic.in/tier1-result.pdf",
  "cutoff_marks": {
    "general": 140.5,
    "obc": 135.0,
    "sc": 120.0,
    "st": 115.0,
    "ews": 138.0
  },
  "total_qualified": 12500,
  "notes": "Qualified candidates can proceed to Tier-2"
}
